name: Ollama
description: Self-host open source AI models like DeepSeek-R1, Llama, and more

inputs.label: Use NVIDIA GPU
inputs.help: Reserve an NVIDIA GPU for inference. Requires the host to have an NVIDIA GPU and the NVIDIA Container Toolkit installed; leave off to run on CPU.

compose:
name: slashnode-ollama
services:
  ollama:
    image: ollama/ollama:0.30.10
    container_name: ollama
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      OLLAMA_ORIGINS: '*'
      OLLAMA_CONTEXT_LENGTH: '8192'
    volumes:
      - ollama_data:/root/.ollama
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:11434:11434
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  ollama_data:
    name: slashnode-ollama_ollama_data
